The Board of Directors of Company will meet on Thursday, August 08, 2019, to 
consider the Financial Results for the quarter ended June 30, 2019. 
An Earnings Call has been scheduled at 05:30 pm (1ST) on Thursday, August 08, 2019. 
Mr. G. Shivakumar, Executive Director and Chief Financial Officer of the Company, 
would give a financial snapshot and discuss the Company's financial performance.
qa_section:
This would be followed by a Q&A session wherein the senior management team 
would address questions relating to the business and outlook of the Company.
